name: signalk-plugin-suki-bridge
description: Streams live SignalK / NMEA data to SUKI Dashboard Pro via Supabase. Configure with your API key from the SUKI Dashboard Settings tab.
signalk-plugin-description: Streams live NMEA data (GPS, wind, depth, battery, engine, tanks) to SUKI Dashboard Pro. Configure with your ingest URL and API key from the SUKI Dashboard Settings tab.
author: SUKI Dashboard Pro
